top_findings.summary: The skill requests high-privilege actions such as accessing Kubernetes secrets and performing broad network captures (e.g., tcpdump on any port 443) that are not strictly scoped to Windsurf-specific debugging. While advanced troubleshooting may require some system access, collecting sensitive secrets and capturing all HTTPS traffic (which could include unrelated or user data) exceeds the minimal data needed for diagnosing Windsurf issues. This poses risks of exposing confidential information beyond the stated purpose.
